<?php namespace Vonage\ProactiveConnect; use Psr\Container\ContainerInterface; use Vonage\Client\APIResource; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\Handler\KeypairHandler; class ClientFactory { public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container): Client { $api = $container->make(APIResource::class); $api->setIsHAL(false) ->setErrorsOn200(false) ->setAuthHandlers([new KeypairHandler()]) ->setBaseUrl('https://api-eu.vonage.com/v0.1/bulk/'); return new Client($api); } }
